biological_replicate: To assess if B. burgdorferi s.s. chemotaxis towards Salp12 is involved in acquisition, we performed RNAi knockdown experiments with I. scapularis nymphs.
technical_replicate: In each experiment, 3 technical replicates were performed.
experimental_design: To assess if B. burgdorferi s.s. chemotaxis towards Salp12 is involved in acquisition, we performed RNAi knockdown experiments with I. scapularis nymphs.
factor_value: we performed RNAi knockdown experiments with I. scapularis nymphs.
number_of_technical_replicates: In each experiment, 3 technical replicates were performed.
number_of_samples: Since we have at least one biological replicate and 4 fractions, we assume at least 4 samples.
